process_information_seen: candidate count in one structural receipt check

interpretation.precedence_rule: For seeds 45-108 and every controlled-shift claim, the active controlled-study fields listed above govern. The inactive fields are unmodified lineage metadata copied from the parent 32-seed study and do not define, filter, or replace a controlled-study endpoint.
interpretation.reason: The generator copied the parent real_study object before adding the controlled-study protocol. It did not delete several parent-only keys, leaving two study generations in one JSON object. The locked analyzer already uses only the active controlled-study fields.

no_scientific_change: No dataset, seed, candidate, attacker, contract, Gamma value, evidence budget, allocation, deployment rule, exclusion, endpoint, statistical test, multiplicity rule, or success condition is changed.
The primary setting remains Gamma 1.1, budget 4000, targeted allocation with a 15 percent floor, and the four intersection-union success gates.
The controlled-shift analyzer remains the outcome-blind implementation committed before fresh aggregate analysis.
